tests.name: FullWidthSection > returns children directly when enabled is false
FullWidthSection > returns children directly when enabled is not provided (defaults to false)
FullWidthSection > wraps children in section div when enabled is true
FullWidthSection > applies custom className when enabled is true
FullWidthSection > does not apply className wrapper when enabled is false
FullWidthSection > renders multiple children when enabled is true
getCategories > returns a record of category objects with standard keys
getCategories > accepts a boolean parameter without throwing
getCategories > defaults to redesign disabled when called without arguments
getCategories > returns different titles for paid category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different descriptions for paid category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different titles for popular category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different titles for featured category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different descriptions for featured category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different titles for monetization category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different descriptions for monetization category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different titles for business category based on the parameter
getCategories > returns different descriptions for business category based on the parameter
getCategories > each category has a slug property
getCategories > categories that do not vary remain the same regardless of parameter
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns false when a site is selected, regardless of other conditions
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns false when a site is selected even with dashboard opt-in
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns true for logged out users when no site is selected and flag is enabled
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns true for logged in users with dashboard opt-in when no site is selected
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns false for logged in users without dashboard opt-in when no site is selected
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns false when the feature flag is disabled even for logged out users
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns false when flag is disabled even with dashboard opt-in
useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled > returns a boolean value
